title: polygala abyssinica
intro: Polygala abyssinica, also known as Sena, is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala abyssinica include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
